content.en:
Perfect Daoshan.

Ye Tian's will clone came here, and there were many cultivators here at this time, almost all of them were half-step perfect controllers or above realms.

And practicing in any place in Perfect Dao Mountain is the same, so Ye Tian found a platform, sat cross-legged, and began to practice enlightenment.

Rumble!!!!

Endless perceptions and spiritual light appeared in front of Ye Tian, and countless Dao changes in the void were manifested, allowing Ye Tian to fully comprehend.

Here, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the changes of a kind of Dao, and quickly mastered a variety of changes, which were many times faster than his usual cultivation.

"It's so easy to grasp the changes of the Dao!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Of course, there are also reasons for the affinity of the Dao, even in the ruins of eternity, the affinity of the Dao is an ability that is incomparably against the sky.

With the help of the Perfect Dao Mountain, Ye Tian quickly mastered the changes of a kind of Dao to a billion kinds, forming the imprint of Dao changes.

Time flies.

There are more and more imprints of change on Ye Tian's body.

Ten kinds!

Twenty kinds!

Thirty kinds!

......

The dense imprints of change converged on Ye Tian's body, representing his heritage and strength.

However, no matter how much the Dao Change Mark has comprehended, it will not allow him to step into the realm of a half-step perfect controller, but it can improve his strength.

Under the increase of many change marks, Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than in the past.

And he also knew about the situation of Senior Brother Black Immortal, and I have to say that Senior Brother Black Immortal was very lucky, and he reluctantly joined the Daoless Tower, but instead of directly becoming a member of the Daoless Tower, he became a member of the reserves.

Reserve members are not currently considered members of the Daoless Tower, they will be arranged to be cultivated somewhere, and after a million eternal eras, they need to be assessed again, and if they pass again, they can enter the Daoless Tower.

If you pass the assessment, you can enter the subsidiary industries and forces under the command of the Wudao Tower.

For many Ten Realm-level masters, even if they become reserve members, that is enough.

After all, there would not be more than twenty Ten Realm-level controllers who could really directly enter the Daoless Tower.

And at the moment.

In the Tower of No Way.

Several Perfect Masters are sitting here, while the Blood Separation Lord below is reporting the situation, these are all Perfect Controllers who far surpass the Blood Separation Lord, and they are the real high-level leaders of the Wudao Tower.

"At present, the situation of those cultivators who joined the Daoless Pagoda has been clearly investigated, except for Ye Tian, the other cultivators are very easy to check. As for Ye Tian, he was not a cultivator of the Eternal Ruins, he should have come from other Eternal Lands. "

The Lord of Blood.

"It doesn't hurt to come from other eternal lands, many forces in the Eternal Ruins have cultivators from other eternal lands. Ye Tian can focus on and cultivate, and if there is any opportunity in the future, he can be given priority. "

"Ye Tian's talent is indeed very demonic, but don't overcultivate, let him go out of his own way is the most important thing. "

"Xueli, Ye Tian will be in charge of Ye Tian from now on. "

Several high-level executives said one by one.

"Yes!"

The Lord of Blood Separation answered.

......

Time flies.

After a long time, Ye Tian had already condensed hundreds of change marks on his body, and his body was already extremely terrifying.

At this time, it was much more difficult for him to condense more Dao change marks.

And Ye Tian's will and controlling body are all improving.

For example, the Daoless Tower has a lot of treasures that can help break the chains.

In the Origin Realm Sea, the Eternal Master can break the shackles and chains with the help of the Cursed Black Stone and the Life White Stone, while Ye Tian can use the Primordial Black Qi and the Life White Stone to break the shackles and chains.

But in reality, these are just two of them.

In the Ruins of Eternity, the shackles and chains that arise from the root of the Body of Control are called the Chain of Control, as long as the Body of Control is raised to a certain level, and then the thirty-six chains of Control are broken, the Body of Half-Step Perfect Control can be formed, and thus become a Half-Step Perfect Master.

Of course.

In the Ruins of Eternity, it is very difficult to break the chains of control.

However, there are many treasures here to help break the chains of control, so the difficulty is much lower.

For example, the Extreme Black Gold and the White Shadow Water, if these two materials are combined, they can quickly break the chains of control one by one.

And Ye Tian had purchased some Extreme Black Gold and White Shadow Water, and he had already broken thirty-three control chains, and he was only three shackles and chains away, and he could become a half-step perfect controller.

However, Ye Tian also knew from the Wudao Tower that the most perfect way to break through was to break the thirty-five chains of control, plus the will was raised to the point where he was about to step into a half-step perfect will.

When the time comes, directly break the thirty-sixth control chain and the half-step perfect will at the same time, and step into the half-step perfect controller realm in a two-in-one way, so that the increase in strength is the largest.

"I must break through to the half-step Eternal Mastery in the most perfect way possible. Although almost all of the Daoless Towers are half-step perfect controllers and perfect controllers, my cultivation is almost the lowest few, but I can't be impatient!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the Origin Realm Sea, it is very difficult to improve the will, especially at his current level, it is almost difficult to improve the will at all.

But in the ruins of eternity, it is not difficult to raise the will.

For example, there is a secret technique in the Daoless Tower that can assist in improving the will of the Transformation Realm, as long as it is practiced, it will not take long to improve to a half-step perfect will.

This secret technique is the Variety Void Technique.

The Hundred Transformations Void Technique uses a kind of change mark of the Seed Dao to create the Void Realm, so that one's own will can follow the frequency of change little by little among the many changes in the Void Realm, thus causing the will to resonate.

Will resonance is also a kind of tempering of will, and the effect of tempering is very fast.

It can be said that the Variety Void Technique is very precious, even for a half-step perfect controller, it is also of great value.

Originally, in the Wudao Tower, only the half-step perfect controller had the permission to practice the Hundred Transformation Void Technique, but Ye Tian received the attention of the Wudao Tower, so the authority was the same as that of the half-step perfect controller, so he could naturally practice the Hundred Transformation Void Technique.

The reason why he has been participating in the changes of the Enlightenment Path during these years is also to prepare for the Hundred Transformations Void Technique.

In short, one hundred Dao Change Marks was only the minimum requirement for the Hundred Transformations Void Transformation Technique, and Ye Tian had now mastered hundreds of Dao Change Marks, which was enough to easily practice the Hundred Transformations Void Transformation Technique.

On this day, Ye Tian began to practice the Hundred Transformation Void Transformation Technique, and it didn't take too long for him to successfully practice the Hundred Transformation Void Transformation Technique.

This moment.

Ye Tian knew very well that he was not far from breaking through to a half-step perfect controller.
